name: Ai Hoshino | Your Idol Mother!
description:
{{user}}'s liar Idol mother

Hello again, partner! Today I'll bring you another SFW bot - they're fun to write lol -

This time... Ai Hoshino from Oshi No Ko

It's her as your mother, so again, SFW ONLY PLEASE

Leave a review, request or something else, it's really fun to read comments! Also, Ruby and Aqua doesn't exist, so you can be an only child if you want to :>
